description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow named nightly-neon that runs at 23:52 every day and can be manually triggered. The workflow builds Calamares in a ubuntu-latest job using a KDE Neon container, prepares the environment and source code, configures and builds Calamares with specific CMake arguments, and uploads the resulting tarball as an artifact. Additionally, it sends a notification to a Matrix room on success or failure.
